title: Helios Install Origin
description: Records the repo/source state used to create a Helios runtime installation. Separates current consistency (helios-envelope.json) from source lineage. Used to detect the case where both protected runtime files and the runtime manifest were rewritten together.

installed_by.description: Identity of the install actor. Typically 'installer' for automated installs.

install_mode.description: Which operation created this origin record.

pwsh_path.description: Absolute path to the PowerShell interpreter used for this install.

claude_settings_path.description: Path to Claude settings.json for this platform/user.

akashic_root.description: Absolute path to the Akashic installer repo root.

akashic_head.description: Git HEAD commit hash of the Akashic repo at install time. Null if not a git repo.

helios_repo_root.description: Git repo root containing the RuntimeBundleRoot. Null if not inside a git repo.

helios_head.description: Git HEAD commit hash of the Helios repo at install time. Null if not a git repo.

runtime_bundle_root.description: Absolute path to the source RuntimeBundleRoot used for this install.

helios_gate_root.description: Absolute path to the live HeliosGateRoot where runtime was installed.

source_protected_hashes.description: SHA-256 hashes of each protected file in RuntimeBundleRoot at install time. Keys are relative paths.

installed_runtime_hashes.description: SHA-256 hashes of each protected runtime file in HeliosGateRoot after install. Keys are relative paths.

initial_manifest_hash.description: SHA-256 of helios-envelope.json at install time.

initial_sidecar_hash.description: Contents of helios-envelope.sha256 at install time.

akashic_installer_hashes.description: SHA-256 hashes of the Akashic installer tools that performed this install.

origin_verified.description: True if all source hashes match installed hashes at generation time.
